sources.comment: ACLED provides conflict event reporting and analysis; RSS varies by section, so the main site is used with keyword filtering.

sources.provider: Al Jazeera English a Top Stories (RSS)
sources.comment: Al Jazeera English RSS for global terrorism and conflict reporting used as corroborating international context.
Legacy BBC RSS feed (newsrss.bbc.co.uk). May be discontinued; retained for world coverage breadth.

Chatham House events feed for upcoming conferences and briefings on international security. Endpoint path is as provided.

sources.provider: Chatham House a International Security Programme (RSS)
sources.comment: Chatham House research programme feed (path/83, likely International Security). Endpoint path is as provided; verify against live feed.
Chatham House press releases feed for authoritative think-tank commentary on international security. Endpoint path is as provided.
Chatham House (RIIA) latest content feed. Endpoint path is as provided; verify against live feed if response is unexpected.
CEP news on extremist group activity, terrorist threat actors, and counter-extremism legislative developments.

sources.provider: International Crisis Group a Research & Analysis
sources.comment: Crisis Group analysis on armed conflict, terrorism and instability; keyword filtering applied to surface terrorism-relevant items.
Crisis Group RSS used for European and international conflict analysis relevant to terrorism, fragile states and security crises.

sources.provider: Global Initiative Against Transnational Organized Crime a News
sources.comment: GI-TOC news on organised crime networks, illicit trade and criminal-terrorist nexus for international context.
INTERPOL does not consistently publish RSS; using the official news and events page.

sources.provider: Just Security a Law, Rights & National Security
sources.comment: Just Security covers law, rights and national security including terrorism prosecutions and CT legislation; keyword filtering applied.

sources.provider: Lawfare a Blog (National Security Law & CT Policy)
sources.comment: Lawfare covers national security law, counter-terrorism policy and intelligence oversight; keyword filtering applied to surface terrorism-relevant items.

sources.provider: Long War Journal a News Feed
sources.comment: Long War Journal RSS feed tracking militant ecosystem developments including al-Qaeda, Islamic State, Taliban, and affiliated groups.

sources.provider: OCCRP a Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project
sources.comment: OCCRP investigative journalism RSS on organised crime, corruption and illicit financial networks relevant to terror financing.
OSCE press releases are provided as web pages; using the press release index.
RESOLVE Network global research on violent extremism, community resilience and counter-terrorism effectiveness.
Reuters does not provide broadly usable public RSS for consumer web content; using the UK news page and relying on keyword filtering.

sources.comment: RFE/RL news on terrorism, extremism and security in Central Asia, Russia and the Middle East used for international context.
No official RSS link advertised; using the IntelBrief category page and relying on keyword filtering.
Tech Against Terrorism podcast site for interviews and analysis on extremist content and digital threat response.

sources.comment: TBI publications on counter-extremism, technology and political violence used for strategic context.

sources.comment: War on the Rocks publishes analysis on national security, military affairs and counter-terrorism; keyword filtering applied.
